name: the-heat-will-kill-you-first
description: Jeff Goodell's urgent investigation into extreme heat as the primary driver of climate chaos — a deep dive into the biology, economics, and survival challenges of life on a rapidly warming planet, told through the stories of the people and places already living on the front lines.
useCase: Understanding extreme heat as the engine of climate impacts, heat physiology and survival, heat inequality, the future of human migration, and adaptation strategies from air conditioning to geoengineering.
knownRisks: Graphic descriptions of death from heatstroke may be disturbing
The author is an environmental journalist with a clear alarmist perspective
Some projections depend on worst-case climate scenarios
The book (2023) covers events up to 2022 only
